Hey, hey, welcome back. Okay, so what we're going to do in this video, and this one's really, really simple, is we're going to go over, we're using the same framework document, by the way. So this one document has all the frameworks on it. And this is if you are selling a high ticket and you want to get people to book a call with you, and you want to go directly to a page where they can book a call. So we're skipping the webinar altogether in this case, and they are literally going to your web page to book a call, which is what we do with my company. So here is the script framework for this. So the first thing we have to understand here is that you need to have an insane offer. So right now, what we're running is we will generate more than our fee, or we will refund the difference plus an extra 20%. So that's an insane offer. So it's literally like, my company will generate more revenue than you pay us, or we will refund the difference plus an additional 20%. So totally insane offer. Now in order to be able to make an insane offer like this, you actually have to be able to do the thing that you're saying. And this is typically only good for services companies. And generally speaking, the only way you can do the thing that you're saying is if you're doing it with the right people. So within the context of our company, if we offer that to guarantee to someone, we do it with somebody who's got something that's got a pretty good customer value, and they've got an existing email list, and their email marketing is horrible. And all we have to do is to show them how to create like a basic little countdown sequence or something and help them get that deployed, and they've already made their investment backs. It's simple for us. In fact, we just got an email two days ago from a guy that's in our program that deployed one little email campaign and made back the entire cost of the program and the campaign is not even done. So the trick here, all right, isn't really, I mean, obviously the insane offer is good, but attract and repel is also very, very critical. This is the actual website that you are driving people to. So like there's a lot of stuff that has to happen here for you not to get messed up. As a matter of fact, give me a sec here. Here we are. So my website may or may not look like this by the time you see it, I'm split testing all kinds of stuff, but it makes this offer, all right, we'll increase your revenue guarantee to work with us and you don't pay. And as it stands now, it's literally like if they are qualified and they do have to be qualified, then yeah, man, if they don't make more than they pay us in the first 30 days, we'll refund the difference plus an extra 20%, which is, you know, it's a bold guarantee, but look, just so you'll know, all right, let's see here, we get their name and email and then we get stuff about their business, you know, and like, so it's, we're not going to talk to people and we're not going to extend that guarantee to people that we can't actually pull it off for. Now, tons of customers will get clients that, hey, you know, they don't have the necessary assets in place. They don't have a big enough list yet where we can't make that guarantee for them. And that's okay. They're like, oh, okay, cool, I understand. It's a math thing. And we'll still end up taking them as clients and they're very, very happy. So that's all good. But just, you know, to clarify, I'm not telling you to make promises you can't back up, right? So we are attracting and repelling not only in the ad, but also on the landing page and that's important. Incidentally, I came up with this concept years ago with my advanced consulting class. It's something called an irresistible entry offer. And it was essentially consultants would say, hey, you know, if you get on the phone with me for a discovery call or strategy session or whatever you want to call it, and you think that I've wasted your time, then I'll pay you $100 just for the 45 minutes we spend together. And that was extremely successful because they're like, man, this person obviously knows what they're talking about. Otherwise, they wouldn't make that type of thing. But then you would only hold the calls with people who you could obviously help. So it's kind of the same idea. So our first zero to 30 seconds here, okay, of this framework, you want to state your insane offer and you want to attract and repel and it's real easy. So it doesn't have to be all 30 seconds, you know, like this could be a short ad, by the way. So you can say something like what I say, which is if you have an online business that's already getting sales, my company will increase your revenue or you don't pay. And I'll bolt on my current winning video ad to the end of this right now. Well, not right now, but to the end of this video, so you can just see it as an example. Or we can go one step further. If you have an online business that's already getting sales, my company can increase your revenue. And in fact, if we don't bring in more than our fee, then we will refund the difference that will pay you an additional 20%. So that's like we're attracting, but we're also repelling because look, if you have an online business that's already getting sales, right? And so we'll get into the rest of the scripting here later. Let's say I skipped the social proof. I was starting this from scratch. I skipped the social proof. I would say, all right, so now, and by the way, in case you're wondering how we're able to do this, well, what we do is simple. First, we get really, really clear on exactly what your revenue target is and make sure it's something that we can attain. We usually work with people in 12 week periods of time. Then we take a look at all of the moving pieces in your business and we find the single most important thing we can do right now to get you closer to your goal. Then we deploy that and then we measure it and we see what happened. If it was successful, which it typically is, then we automate that and turn that into an ongoing part of your sales process. Then we repeat that over and over again. The net effect of it is a significant and measurable result, or rather a significant and measurable increase in revenue within a short period of time. There's no gimmicks. There's nothing fancy. There's not a tremendous amount of extra work for you to wade through. I've got to take my time and do in this part right here. Now, if again, I want to make 100% sure that no one's going to be like, oh, you promised the world. Again, I would repel one more time. I would say, now remember, like I said, we cannot make this type of guarantee for everyone. For the clients we accept, yes, we really can have a measurable increase in revenue. In fact, you will make more than our fee in your first 30 days, or we will refund the difference plus an additional 20%, but we can't do that for just anybody. You need to meet several requirements. You need to have an existing business, obviously. You need to have a proven sales process that's currently getting customers. You need to have a decent customer value, and you need to have a database that's large enough that we can launch some promotions to to get immediate revenue. Blam, really, really simple. That's just me winging that off of the cuff there in terms of this framework. Now what we want to do is we want to do a call to action. This is where we tell them what to do. I like to get a little more in depth in mine than what other people do because I know that the market is very jaded. My call to action, what I want to do is I want to say, all right, here's what to do. Go to my website, watch the video, set up an appointment. Then I want to describe the process. When you go to the website, you're going to see a short video. It tells you exactly how everything works. There are about three sentences of copy on there. If you like what you see, you can schedule a time on the calendar that works for you, and you can schedule your call. Maybe I should learn how to spell. That's called action number two. I'm telling them to go to the website. I'm telling them what they can expect there, and I'm telling them what to do if they like what they see. I'm very, very explicit. Here's where this is different. I think this is very important if you're dealing with a market that is profoundly jaded, like the market that I work with. Most people online have gone through the strategy session thing with some high pressure sales pitch and they hate it. What I like to do is to reassure them that this is not that and we don't do that. I'll say, hey, this isn't one of those high pressures, quote unquote, strategy session calls or anything like that. If we can help you, we'll show you how. We can't, we'll tell you. Please know that regardless of whatever you decide to do, you will find this discussion to be valuable. With that said, so now I'm just going to segue right in here, go ahead and click the link by this video. If you like what you see on my webpage, then schedule a time and let's talk. That's very, very important in my opinion, this last little bit. Otherwise, you could be just another strategy session person or whatever. That's so common, at least in the marketing space. It's so incredibly common that of course people are super jaded. You want to just tell them exactly what happens. I've seen this methodology work exceptionally well, even in markets like insurance and credit counseling and in banking and all sorts of things. When they just describe to the person what's going to happen, when they take the next step. I remember I had a client who was in credit counseling and when they added this little scripting to get people to call in or to fill out an appointment, rather, an appointment request, when he added this part, their appointments increase significantly. This part was scripted something like this. I'm going to make it up by memory. It was like, now when you schedule your call, you're going to be talking with Cindy and then he would flash a picture of Cindy and Cindy was maybe 55, just looked super friendly. Then he would say, now Cindy's been working here for 15 years. She's just one of the nicest people ever. She's in charge of everything. What Cindy's going to go over with you are these three things. I just want you to know that Cindy is not a high pressure salesperson or anything like that. We genuinely want to help you and we really just think the value of the experience will speak for itself. If you want to work together, we can talk about it. Like seeing who they were going to be talking to and knowing that it was going to be, or at least hearing that it wasn't going to be some awful experience, it caused that conversion rate to go up. Click on the button near this video schedule a call with my team and we will tell you if and how we can help you. And by the way, if we can't help you, we'll let you know. There's absolutely no pressure. The reason we don't have to have pressure is because we get the results like what I'm about to share with you now. So here's one case study. This client is an information marketing client. They sell training on how to turn your knowledge into a sellable course. This is the 30-day period before they started working with us. So March 24th through April 24th. So this is before us. They did their total revenue of $16,659. Now what's really crazy about this is they were spending close to $50,000 a month in Facebook. They were just bleeding money. So what we did is we came in and our first mission is always to generate revenue and drop expenses where we can. So I'll just do the next 30 days here, April 25th through May 25th. And you can see this is like a 400-something percent growth in overall revenue for them. But what's really great is we dropped their Facebook ad percent or Facebook ad spend down by like 90%. So instead of spending $50,000, we were spending about $5,000. Here's another client. These folks sell information about trading and how to do well in the stock market. They started working with us on April 22nd. So as you can see from the arrow there, I'm just taking a screenshot of the 30-day period before us. They did $26,000 in revenue. We took over on the 22nd of April, started doing our thing for the next 30-day period. As you can see, 23rd of April through May 23rd, the revenue was $121,944. That's a 456% increase in revenue. How did we do that? Well we do it the same way we do it for all the clients, which is we go into your business, we look and we see where there are immediate opportunities to increase revenue, preferably without spending extra money on ads, which is the case with this particular client by the way. We didn't have to spend extra money on ads. And then we systemize that opportunity. So we create a campaign, we deploy it, we measure the results, and if it works, we automate it and turn it into a system. And then we start dealing with ads. I'll give you another example. This is a client who is in the health space. They help vegans get into great shape. They have a call funnel. This is the 30 days before us. This is, we didn't run any ads or anything to speak of. In this next 30 days, we just utilized what they thought was a totally dead list. And over the next 30 day period, we generated an additional $132,000 in revenue there. So that's a $50,000 increase in what they did the month before us. And we did not have any sort of substantial increase in ad spend. Because again, like I said, we like to try to generate as much revenue as we can before we start increasing ad spend. Now let's have a look at how this account has continued to grow. So we just looked at April 12th through May 12th, saw that pretty good increase. Let's look at May 13th through June 13th and see what that's looking like. Yeah, see, it's continuing to grow. So this business is continuing to grow. Because now what we're doing is because we have built these systems that maximize the value of all of the leads, now we're generating more leads for these folks. So now the leads become increasingly more valuable. So typically that's our formula. Very rarely a client will come in and they just want us to work straight away on ads. And they don't really have much in terms of assets that we can use to generate immediate revenue. So I'll walk you through another case study, which is pretty interesting. So this client started working with us right at the end of April. But we really weren't doing very much in terms of ads for them until really May 1st. So in their April month, they did $9,800 in revenue. They had a very little spend. In fact, for the entire year prior to working with us, they had spent less than $3,000 on Facebook ads ever. They're in a niche that's very similar to scrapbooking. They've got a great offer. It just seems to work really, really well. So we said, OK, let's just start with ads and then start building systems later. Let's strike while the iron's hot. So I want to show you for the month of May here. And let me fix my date range here for the month of May. There we go. May 1st, 3.30. First, you can see that the campaign that is our primary campaign, this is the one we managed, you got a 538% return on investment. So now that you've seen those, the question is, can we do the same thing for you? And the answer is maybe. So one thing all of those clients have in common is they just had the raw materials that we need in order to build a quick win campaign. Those raw materials are a product that people want, a sales process that's working pretty good, and a database of people that we can send the offer to. The only way to find out, really, if we can help you is just to book a call with the team. It's not one of those high pressure strategy sessions or anything like that. If we can't help you, we'll definitely let you know. We'll be respectful about it. And if we can help you, we will tell you exactly how by telling you exactly what we would do in order to generate a quick win for you. And if you like what you hear, then we can work together. And if you don't want to be a client, then worst case scenario is you get a free plan of here's exactly what you could do to generate probably a quick win in your business. So if you like everything you've seen in this video, go ahead, book an appointment with the team, and let's get started. You have absolutely nothing to lose and everything to gain. Thanks so much for watching. Take it easy.
